articles.title: Prediction Markets Create New Insider Trading Headaches for Executives
articles.summary: Corporate executives now face murky legal territory when betting on prediction markets that could be influenced by their inside knowledge. The uncertainty could either drive away institutional players or create a compliance nightmare that slows mainstream adoption of prediction markets.

articles.title: Easter Kalshi Referral Code SILIVE update: $10 NBA bonus for Stephen Curry return tonight
articles.summary: Kalshi is offering a $10 NBA bonus tied to Stephen Curry's return to action tonight, likely connected to their Easter referral promotion using code SILIVE. The timing creates a perfect storm for prediction market activity, as Curry's return from injury will drive heavy betting volume on Warriors games and player performance markets.

articles.title: Polymarket took down wagers tied to rescue of downed Air Force officer
articles.summary: Polymarket removed betting markets related to the rescue efforts for a downed Air Force officer, likely due to concerns about wagering on active military operations or individual safety. The takedown highlights how prediction markets must navigate ethical boundaries when real-time events involve human lives, setting precedent for which crisis situations remain off-limits to bettors.

articles.title: Konnor Griffin, Colt Emerson, and Baseball's Pre-Debut Money Boom: What Kalshi's Rookie of the Year Markets Say Now
articles.summary: Kalshi's Rookie of the Year markets are pricing in massive expectations for prospects Konnor Griffin and Colt Emerson before they've even stepped foot in the majors. The betting action reveals how prediction markets are becoming the new frontier for speculating on athletic talent years before traditional sportsbooks even list these players.

articles.title: Regulation of prediction markets badly lacking | EDITORIAL
articles.summary: Regulators are failing to keep pace with the explosive growth of prediction markets, leaving traders and platforms operating in a legal gray zone. This regulatory vacuum creates massive uncertainty for legitimate operators while giving scammers and manipulators free rein to exploit unsuspecting bettors.

articles.title: ‘Dystopian death market’: Polymarket halts bets regarding US airman after Moulton condemns site
articles.summary: Polymarket suspended betting markets related to a US airman's death after facing criticism from Representative Seth Moulton, who called the platform a "dystopian death market." The controversy highlights growing regulatory pressure on prediction markets that touch sensitive topics, potentially forcing platforms to narrow their scope to avoid political backlash.

articles.title: Could JPMorgan Be Your Next Prediction Market Platform? Jamie Dimon Says 'It's Possible One Day...'
articles.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon hinted that the banking giant could enter the prediction markets space, suggesting it's within the realm of possibility for the future. If America's largest bank jumps into prediction markets, it would bring massive institutional credibility and potentially billions in trading volume to a sector that's still fighting for mainstream acceptance.

articles.title: Kalshi outcome contracts banned in Nevada
articles.summary: Nevada regulators just banned Kalshi's outcome contracts, cutting off another state from the prediction market platform's offerings. The move signals growing regulatory pushback against prediction markets expanding beyond traditional gambling jurisdictions, potentially forcing platforms to navigate a patchwork of state-by-state restrictions.

articles.title: The 4 biggest differences between Kalshi and Polymarket
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket have emerged as the two dominant prediction market platforms, but they operate under vastly different regulatory frameworks, user bases, betting limits, and market selection strategies. These differences will determine which platform captures more serious money and mainstream adoption as prediction markets go from niche hobby to legitimate financial instrument.

articles.title: Opinion | Major League Baseball’s bad bet on Polymarket
articles.summary: Major League Baseball apparently made some questionable decision involving Polymarket that's drawing criticism. Whatever MLB did wrong here could signal how traditional sports leagues are fumbling their entry into prediction markets, potentially creating regulatory headaches or market credibility issues.

articles.title: Can anything stop Kalshi?
articles.summary: Kalshi continues its aggressive expansion into new prediction markets, seemingly unstoppable as it captures more trading volume and launches increasingly diverse betting categories. Their dominance could reshape how Americans think about prediction markets, potentially forcing competitors like Polymarket to pivot or risk getting steamrolled by Kalshi's regulatory advantages and mainstream appeal.

articles.title: Feds sue three states over prediction market crackdowns
articles.summary: The federal government is taking three states to court for restricting or banning prediction markets within their borders. This legal showdown could establish whether states can block residents from trading on platforms like Kalshi and PredictIt, potentially opening up billions in locked-out market volume.
